sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْعُرْسُ فِي الْقَرْيَةِ يَوْمًا سَعِيدًا لِلْجَمِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Svadba u selu bila je sretan dan za sve.
sentences.translationEn: The wedding in the village was a happy day for everyone.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ كُلُّ النَّاسِ مِنَ الْبُيُوتِ الْقَرِيبَةِ وَالْبَعِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svi su dolazili iz bliskih i dalekih kuća.
sentences.translationEn: All the people came from nearby and distant homes.

sentences.translation: Jeli su hranu, pjevali i plesali.
sentences.translationEn: They ate food, sang, and danced.
The celebration lasted until the break of dawn.
